title: Health | Stats NZ
content:
Health statistics give you information about injuries, disabilities, abortions, and life expectancy in New Zealand.
Incidence rates for work-related injury claims, by claim type, 2002–2023
Incidence rate, all claims
Incidence rate, entitlement payment claims

## Latest information releases about health

## Serious injury outcome indicators: 2000–2024
Serious injury outcome indicators present the annual number and rate of serious injury outcomes in New Zealand, through a set of indicators for fatal and non-fatal injuries.

## Injury statistics – work-related claims: 2024
Injury statistics for work-related claims give information about claims accepted by ACC for work-related injuries.

## Work, education, transport, and population structure: 2023 Census
Work, education, transport, and population structure: 2023 Census provides information about the final release of Aotearoa Data Explorer tables from the 2023 Census as well as two supporting news stories and geospatial files.

## Disability and activity limitations: 2023 Census
Provides information through the release of 52 new Aotearoa Data Explorer tables and a report Using data from the Household Disability Survey and the 2023 Census.

## Latest publications about health

## An overview of disability data in Aotearoa New Zealand: Summary
Provides a high-level overview of key disability data in Aotearoa New Zealand, drawing on findings from the report An overview of disability data in Aotearoa New Zealand.

## An overview of disability data in Aotearoa New Zealand
A reference resource designed to support people who want to engage more with disability data but need guidance on what information is available.

## Guide to mortality measures
Describes a range of mortality measures, discusses the strengths and limitations of these measures, and identifies where published measures are available.

## Serious injury outcome indicators: 2000–2024
Serious injury outcome indicators present the annual number and rate of serious injury outcomes in New Zealand, through a set of indicators for fatal and non-fatal injuries.

## CSV files for download
CSV files for download has data from Infoshare and Stats NZ information releases.

## Tools with data about health

## How long will I live?
Get an indication of the age you’re likely to live to.

## Place and ethnic group summaries
Explore statistics about the population by region, district, and smaller areas, and by ethnic group.
Build tables from our biggest range of datasets, including long-term time series. View on screen or download Excel or CSV files.

## Disability estimates for small areas 2013
This interactive data tool allows people to look at the rate of disability and specific impairments across territorial authority areas in New Zealand.

## Environmental indicators
View indicators and trends across five environmental domains and the cross-domain area of biodiversity.

## Consumers price index visualisation
View and explore changes in the CPI basket of goods and services. Download data in CSV format.

## NZ social indicators
The data in these indicators is no longer being updated. Explore data on a range of key New Zealand social statistics.

## NZ progress indicators
The data in these indicators is no longer being updated. Get a picture of how well we are living, how resources are being distributed and used, and what we are leaving for future generations.
Get statistical metadata – what we measure, definitions, and how we produce statistics.

## Geographic data service
Search, browse, and download geographic boundaries and maps for New Zealand, plus a selection of 2018 and 2013 Census spatial data.
Find and download concepts and definitions, classifications, concordances, and standards used for data and statistical activities across government.

## Information about data
Get technical information such as classifications used, survey design, and a glossary of statistical terms.

### Metadata in DataInfo+
DataInfo+ has metadata about our statistical collections and classifications, and questionnaires and forms.
DataInfo+ concepts gives definitions of terms used by Stats NZ.
Abortion statistics – DataInfo+ gives technical information about how abortion statistics are produced.
Injury statistics – work-related claims – DataInfo+ gives information about data that has not changed between releases.
Injury statistics – work-related claims concepts – DataInfo+ gives definition of terms and concepts used in this release.
New Zealand life tables – DataInfo+

### Methods, sources, and user guides
Injuries – topic page provides the latest releases and news about injuries, and information about how injury data is classified and used.
- Gender sex and intersex
